message.content:
This section provides quantitative market data and trend analysis for mobile game advertising in Japan and South Korea from January to December 2025. It is structured to answer retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topics & Claims:** Regional ad placement trends, creative format dominance, and top-performing genres. Claims that video creatives (77.3%) slightly exceed regional norms to become the absolute mainstream format, with RPG and simulation/management as leading categories.
- **Dates:** January 2025 – December 2025.
- **Entities:** Trending game titles (奇蹟MU, Mahjong Wonders, 江湖有詭, 杖剑传说, 蔚藍星球, 國王很忙, 我的花園世界) and the data source (广大大-广告主分析模块).
- **Metrics:** 61,000 active advertisers (+51% YoY); 13.4 million deduplicated ad creatives (+55% YoY). Monthly metrics track total advertiser counts, active creative volumes, and the respective percentages of new advertisers and new creatives per month.
- **Figures/Tables:** Monthly trend charts (Jan–Dec 2025) for advertiser volume and active creative volume, each paired with new-entry ratio percentages. Includes a system/platform distribution chart.
- **Evidence Types:** Aggregated advertising performance data, year-over-year growth rates, monthly time-series visualizations, and platform-sourced market analytics.
- **Procedures/Definitions:** None explicitly covered.
This section enables precise retrieval of 2025 market scale, growth trajectories, format preferences, monthly activity fluctuations, and specific trending titles within the Japan/Korea mobile game advertising sector.

   *Tables/Figures:* Monthly line/bar charts for advertiser counts and active creatives (Jan-Dec 2025), showing total counts and percentages of new materials/advertisers. System/platform distribution chart.

response_text:
This section provides quantitative market data and trend analysis for mobile game advertising in Japan and South Korea from January to December 2025. It is structured to answer retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topics & Claims:** Regional ad placement trends, creative format dominance, and top-performing genres. Claims that video creatives (77.3%) slightly exceed regional norms to become the absolute mainstream format, with RPG and simulation/management as leading categories.
- **Dates:** January 2025 – December 2025.
- **Entities:** Trending game titles (奇蹟MU, Mahjong Wonders, 江湖有詭, 杖剑传说, 蔚藍星球, 國王很忙, 我的花園世界) and the data source (广大大-广告主分析模块).
- **Metrics:** 61,000 active advertisers (+51% YoY); 13.4 million deduplicated ad creatives (+55% YoY). Monthly metrics track total advertiser counts, active creative volumes, and the respective percentages of new advertisers and new creatives per month.
- **Figures/Tables:** Monthly trend charts (Jan–Dec 2025) for advertiser volume and active creative volume, each paired with new-entry ratio percentages. Includes a system/platform distribution chart.
- **Evidence Types:** Aggregated advertising performance data, year-over-year growth rates, monthly time-series visualizations, and platform-sourced market analytics.
- **Procedures/Definitions:** None explicitly covered.
This section enables precise retrieval of 2025 market scale, growth trajectories, format preferences, monthly activity fluctuations, and specific trending titles within the Japan/Korea mobile game advertising sector.
